stemHtml: What is the function of a flap load limiting (relief) protection system?

options.a: To retract the flaps when exceeding the limiting speed of the currently selected flap position.
options.b: To increase the aircraft`s angle of attack such that the limiting speed of the currently selected flap position is respected.
options.c: To reduce flight deck workload by automatically selecting flaps.
options.d: To increase the lift of the aeroplane.
